sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72644" key="oi)smo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰσμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n72644.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐκφώνησις ἐναποσβεννυμένου πυρός</ref></xr>, Zos.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg005.perseus-grc1:p.216B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.216B.</biblScope> </bibl> (fort. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σισμός</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
